positive: An intricate, stylized jungle scene featuring a central, minimalist silhouette of a jaguar paw print overlaid on lush tropical foliage. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing strong, graphic contrast between deep emerald greens, burnt orange accents, and creamy off-white negative space. The style should mimic elegant linocut print art combined with modern botanical illustration, ensuring clean, thick lines suitable for screen printing. The overall aesthetic is sophisticated, rhythmic, and visually striking, with dappled light filtering through implied canopy to create natural highlights and deep shadows. Perfect for high-quality apparel print.
